name: WhatsAppSend
description: Send a text message to any WhatsApp contact or group. Use phone number (e.g. '5511999999999') for contacts or a JID (e.g. '120363...@g.us') for groups.

to.description: Phone number or JID of the recipient

name: WhatsAppSendMedia
description: Send a media file (image, document, audio, video) to a WhatsApp contact or group.

to.description: Phone number or JID of the recipient

filePath.description: Absolute path to the media file

mediaType.description: Type of media: image, document, audio, or video

fileName.description: File name for documents (defaults to original file name)

name: WhatsAppListChats
description: List recent WhatsApp chats with last message preview. Shows contacts and groups the connector has seen messages from.

limit.description: Maximum number of chats to return (default: 20)

name: WhatsAppReadMessages
description: Read recent messages from a specific WhatsApp chat. Returns message history with sender, text, and timestamp.
searchHint: read messages from a WhatsApp chat

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 20)

name: WhatsAppSearchContacts
description: Search WhatsApp contacts and groups by name. Returns matching JIDs that can be used with WhatsAppSend.

query.description: Search query to match against contact/group names
